title: draba × moritziana
intro: Draba × moritziana, also known as Rockcress, is a hybrid plant species within the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its small, white, and fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Draba × moritziana include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, Rockcress is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which are used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
